title: Update module github.com/containers/ocicrypt to v1.3.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/ocicrypt](https://redirect.github.com/containers/ocicrypt) | `v1.3.0` → `v1.3.1` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2focicrypt/v1.3.1?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2focicrypt/v1.3.0/v1.3.1?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/ocicrypt (github.com/containers/ocicrypt)</summary>

### [`v1.3.1`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/ocicrypt/releases/tag/v1.3.1): ocicrypt v1.3.1

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/ocicrypt/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1)

##### What's changed:

- pkcs11: Add missing support for pkcs11 to SortDecryptionKeys
- Regenerate the protobuf code to stop using deprecated github.com/golang/protobuf
- Update dependencies

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/containers/ocicrypt/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1>

</details>

---
